title: Classic Scrambled Eggs
steps: Crack eggs into a bowl and whisk with milk, salt, and pepper
Melt butter in a non-stick skillet over medium-low heat
Pour in egg mixture and let sit for 20 seconds
Gently push eggs from edges to center, forming soft curds
Continue folding until just set but still slightly moist
Remove from heat and garnish with fresh chives

title: Overnight Oats with Berries
steps: Combine oats, milk, yogurt, chia seeds, honey, and vanilla in a jar
Stir well to mix all ingredients
Cover and refrigerate overnight or at least 4 hours
In the morning, stir and top with fresh mixed berries
Add extra milk if a thinner consistency is desired

title: Avocado Toast with Poached Egg
steps: Toast the sourdough bread until golden and crisp
Halve the avocado, remove the pit, and mash with a fork
Season mashed avocado with salt, pepper, and a squeeze of lemon
Bring a pot of water to a gentle simmer and add vinegar
Crack each egg into the simmering water and poach for 3-4 minutes
Spread avocado on toast, top with poached egg and red pepper flakes

title: Banana Pancakes
steps: Mash bananas in a bowl until smooth
Whisk in eggs until combined
Add oat flour, baking powder, and cinnamon and mix until just combined
Heat butter in a skillet over medium heat
Pour 1/4 cup batter per pancake and cook until bubbles form
Flip and cook another 1-2 minutes until golden
Serve with maple syrup

title: Greek Yogurt Parfait
steps: Stir vanilla extract into Greek yogurt
Layer half the yogurt in a glass or bowl
Add half the granola and half the berries
Repeat with remaining yogurt, granola, and berries
Drizzle with honey and top with sliced almonds

title: Veggie Breakfast Burrito
steps: Scramble eggs in a skillet with salt and pepper
Warm tortillas in a dry pan for 30 seconds each side
Warm black beans in a small pot
Layer eggs, beans, cheese, salsa, and avocado on each tortilla
Fold in sides and roll tightly
Cut in half and serve with extra salsa

title: French Toast
steps: Whisk together eggs, milk, vanilla, and cinnamon in a shallow dish
Melt butter in a skillet over medium heat
Dip each bread slice in egg mixture, coating both sides
Cook 2-3 minutes per side until golden brown
Dust with powdered sugar and serve with maple syrup

title: Shakshuka
steps: Heat olive oil in a deep skillet over medium heat
Sauté onion and bell pepper until softened, about 5 minutes
Add garlic, cumin, and paprika, cook 1 minute
Pour in diced tomatoes and simmer for 10 minutes
Make 4 wells in the sauce and crack an egg into each
Cover and cook 5-7 minutes until egg whites are set
Garnish with cilantro and serve with crusty bread

title: Blueberry Muffins
steps: Preheat oven to 375°F and line a muffin tin with paper liners
Mix flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl
Whisk oil, egg, and milk in a separate bowl
Pour wet ingredients into dry and stir until just combined
Gently fold in blueberries
Divide batter among 12 muffin cups
Bake 20-25 minutes until golden and a toothpick comes out clean

title: Egg and Cheese Bagel
steps: Cook bacon in a skillet until crispy, set aside on paper towels
Toast bagel halves until golden
Melt butter in the skillet over medium heat
Fry eggs to desired doneness, season with salt and pepper
Place cheese on the bottom bagel half
Top with eggs and bacon, close with top half

title: Chia Seed Pudding
steps: Whisk chia seeds, coconut milk, maple syrup, and vanilla in a bowl
Stir well to prevent clumping
Cover and refrigerate for at least 4 hours or overnight
Stir before serving to break up any clumps
Top with diced mango and toasted coconut flakes

title: Breakfast Quesadilla
steps: Scramble eggs with bell pepper and onion
Place a tortilla in a skillet over medium heat
Sprinkle half the cheese on the tortilla
Add scrambled eggs and remaining cheese
Top with second tortilla and press down gently
Cook 2 minutes per side until golden and cheese melts
Cut into wedges and serve with salsa

title: Smoked Salmon Bagel
steps: Toast bagel halves until golden
Spread cream cheese generously on each half
Layer smoked salmon on top
Garnish with capers, red onion slices, and fresh dill
Squeeze lemon over the top and serve

title: Steel-Cut Oatmeal
steps: Bring water to a boil in a medium saucepan
Stir in steel-cut oats and reduce heat to low
Simmer for 20-25 minutes, stirring occasionally
Stir in milk, brown sugar, and cinnamon
Cook 2 more minutes until creamy
Top with sliced banana and chopped walnuts

title: Egg Muffin Cups
steps: Preheat oven to 375°F and spray a muffin tin with cooking spray
Whisk eggs with milk, salt, and pepper
Divide ham, bell pepper, and cheese among 8 muffin cups
Pour egg mixture evenly into each cup
Bake for 18-20 minutes until eggs are set
Let cool 2 minutes before removing from tin
Store extras in the fridge for up to 4 days

title: Acai Bowl
steps: Blend acai packets, banana, blueberries, and almond milk until thick
Pour into a bowl — should be very thick like soft serve
Top with granola, sliced strawberries, and any other toppings
Drizzle with honey and serve immediately

title: Hash Brown Casserole
ingredients: 1 bag (30 oz) frozen hash browns, thawed
steps: Preheat oven to 350°F and grease a 9x13 baking dish
Mix soup, sour cream, 1.5 cups cheese, butter, garlic powder, salt, and pepper
Fold in hash browns until well coated
Spread mixture into baking dish
Top with remaining cheese
Bake 45-50 minutes until bubbly and golden on top
Let cool 5 minutes before serving

title: Cinnamon Roll Bake
ingredients: 2 cans refrigerated cinnamon rolls with icing
steps: Preheat oven to 375°F and grease a 9x13 baking dish
Cut each cinnamon roll into quarters
Arrange pieces in the baking dish
Whisk eggs, cream, cinnamon, vanilla, and maple syrup
Pour mixture over cinnamon roll pieces
Bake 25-30 minutes until golden and set in center
Drizzle with the included icing and serve warm

title: Breakfast Smoothie
steps: Add almond milk and spinach to blender, blend until smooth
Add banana, mango, yogurt, flaxseed, and honey
Blend until completely smooth and creamy
Pour into a glass and serve immediately
Add ice if a thicker consistency is desired

title: Huevos Rancheros
steps: Warm black beans in a small pot with a splash of water
Fry tortillas in oil until slightly crispy, drain on paper towels
Fry eggs sunny-side up in the same skillet
Place tortillas on plates, spread beans on each
Top each with a fried egg
Spoon salsa over the eggs
Garnish with queso fresco, avocado, and cilantro

title: Chicken Caesar Salad
steps: Season chicken with salt and pepper
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat
Cook chicken 6-7 minutes per side until cooked through
Let rest 5 minutes, then slice into strips
Chop romaine and place in a large bowl
Toss with Caesar dressing and half the Parmesan
Top with chicken, croutons, and remaining Parmesan

title: Turkey and Avocado Wrap
steps: Warm tortillas in a dry skillet for 30 seconds each side
Spread mustard evenly over each tortilla
Layer turkey, cheese, avocado, tomato, and lettuce
Fold in the sides, then roll tightly from bottom to top
Cut diagonally in half and serve

title: Quinoa Buddha Bowl
steps: Cook quinoa according to package directions
Toss chickpeas with olive oil, salt, and pepper
Roast chickpeas at 400°F for 20 minutes until crispy
Whisk tahini with lemon juice and 2 tablespoons water
Divide quinoa between bowls
Arrange sweet potato, chickpeas, avocado, and spinach on top
Drizzle with tahini dressing

title: Caprese Panini
steps: Brush one side of each bread slice with olive oil
Layer mozzarella, tomato, and basil on bread
Season with salt and pepper, drizzle with balsamic glaze
Close sandwiches and cook in a panini press or skillet
Cook 3-4 minutes per side until crispy and cheese melts
Cut in half and serve warm

title: Tuna Salad Sandwich
steps: Flake tuna into a bowl
Mix in mayonnaise, mustard, celery, and red onion
Season with salt and pepper to taste
Divide tuna salad between two bread slices
Top with lettuce and tomato
Close sandwiches and cut diagonally

title: Greek Pita Pocket
steps: Warm pita halves in a dry skillet
Mix chicken, cucumber, tomatoes, olives, and feta
Spread tzatziki inside each pita pocket
Fill pitas with the chicken mixture
Serve immediately

title: Black Bean Tacos
steps: Heat black beans in a small pot with cumin and chili powder
Mash beans slightly with a fork, leaving some whole
Warm tortillas in a dry skillet
Spread bean mixture on each tortilla
Top with lettuce, pico de gallo, avocado, and sour cream

title: Chicken Salad Lettuce Wraps
steps: Mix chicken, yogurt, mustard, cranberries, celery, and pecans
Season with salt and pepper
Spoon chicken salad into lettuce leaves
Roll or fold lettuce around the filling
Serve as a light, low-carb lunch

title: Veggie Quesadilla
ingredients: Sour cream and salsa for serving
steps: Sauté mushrooms and bell pepper until tender
Place a tortilla in a skillet over medium heat
Sprinkle cheese evenly, add vegetables and jalapeño
Top with second tortilla
Cook 2-3 minutes per side until golden and cheese melts
Cut into wedges and serve with sour cream and salsa

title: Mediterranean Grain Bowl
steps: Divide farro between bowls
Arrange roasted peppers and cucumber on top
Add a generous dollop of hummus
Crumble feta over the bowl
Drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice
Garnish with fresh mint leaves

title: BLT Sandwich
steps: Cook bacon until crispy, drain on paper towels
Toast bread until golden
Spread mayonnaise on each bread slice
Layer lettuce, tomato, and bacon on two slices
Season tomatoes with salt and pepper
Top with remaining bread and cut diagonally

title: Egg Drop Soup
steps: Bring chicken broth to a boil
Mix cornstarch with water to make a slurry
Stir slurry into boiling broth until slightly thickened
Reduce heat to a gentle simmer
Slowly drizzle beaten eggs into the soup while stirring in one direction
Add sesame oil and season with salt and white pepper
Garnish with sliced green onions

title: Falafel Wrap
steps: Warm falafel according to package directions
Warm pita breads briefly
Spread tahini sauce inside each pita
Add falafel balls, lettuce, tomatoes, and pickled turnips
Drizzle with hot sauce if desired
Wrap and serve immediately

title: Grilled Cheese and Tomato Soup
steps: Make grilled cheese: butter bread, add cheese, cook in skillet 2-3 minutes per side
Heat tomato soup with milk in a saucepan
Season soup with salt and pepper
Cut grilled cheese sandwiches diagonally
Serve sandwiches alongside bowls of warm soup
Dip and enjoy

title: Cobb Salad
steps: Arrange mixed greens on a large platter or in bowls
Arrange chicken, eggs, bacon, avocado, tomatoes, and blue cheese in rows on top
Drizzle with ranch dressing
Toss gently before eating or serve composed

title: Vietnamese Banh Mi
steps: Season pork with soy sauce and cook in a skillet until done
Split baguette rolls and toast lightly
Spread mayo mixed with sriracha on both sides
Layer pork, pickled vegetables, cucumber, cilantro, and jalapeño
Press gently and cut in half

title: Pasta Salad
steps: Cook pasta according to package directions, drain and cool
Combine pasta with tomatoes, cucumber, olives, and onion
Pour Italian dressing over and toss to coat
Top with crumbled feta and fresh basil
Refrigerate for 30 minutes before serving for best flavor

title: Chicken Pesto Sandwich
steps: Slice ciabatta rolls in half
Spread pesto on both halves
Layer chicken, mozzarella, roasted peppers, and arugula
Close sandwiches and press gently
Cut in half and serve

title: Asian Noodle Bowl
steps: Cook rice noodles according to package, drain and rinse with cold water
Whisk together soy sauce, rice vinegar, sesame oil, and honey
Toss noodles with cabbage, carrot, and edamame
Pour dressing over and toss to combine
Garnish with sesame seeds and cilantro

title: Lemon Herb Grilled Chicken
steps: Whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, zest, garlic, and herbs
Season chicken with salt and pepper
Marinate chicken for at least 30 minutes
Preheat grill to medium-high
Grill 5-6 minutes per side until cooked through
Let rest 5 minutes before serving

title: Beef Stir-Fry with Vegetables
steps: Toss steak with 1 tablespoon soy sauce and cornstarch
Heat vegetable oil in a wok over high heat
Stir-fry beef in batches until browned, set aside
Add broccoli, bell pepper, and snap peas, stir-fry 3-4 minutes
Add garlic, ginger, remaining soy sauce, and sesame oil
Return beef to wok and toss together
Serve over steamed rice

title: Baked Salmon with Asparagus
steps: Preheat oven to 400°F, line a sheet pan with parchment
Whisk olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, mustard, and honey
Arrange salmon and asparagus on the pan
Brush salmon with the honey-mustard mixture
Season with salt and pepper
Bake 12-15 minutes until salmon flakes easily
Garnish with fresh dill

title: One-Pot Chicken Pasta
steps: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium-high heat
Season and cook chicken until golden, about 5 minutes
Add onion and garlic, sauté 2 minutes
Add marinara and broth, bring to a boil
Add pasta, reduce heat, cover, simmer 12-14 minutes
Top with mozzarella, cover until melted
Garnish with basil and serve

title: Vegetable Curry
steps: Heat coconut oil, sauté onion until softened
Add garlic and curry paste, stir 1 minute
Pour in coconut milk, bring to a simmer
Add sweet potato, cook 10 minutes
Add cauliflower and chickpeas, simmer 8 minutes
Stir in spinach until wilted
Serve over basmati rice

title: Spaghetti Bolognese
steps: Heat olive oil, cook onion, carrots, and celery 8 minutes
Add garlic, cook 1 minute
Brown ground beef over high heat
Add wine, reduce by half
Add tomatoes and oregano, simmer 30 minutes
Cook spaghetti in salted water
Serve sauce over spaghetti with Parmesan

title: Shrimp Tacos
steps: Toss shrimp with chili powder, cumin, and salt
Heat olive oil, cook shrimp 2-3 minutes per side
Mix sour cream with lime juice
Warm tortillas
Fill with shrimp, cabbage, and avocado
Drizzle with lime crema and garnish with cilantro

title: Chicken Alfredo
steps: Cook fettuccine according to package directions
Season and cook chicken in butter until done, slice
In the same pan, sauté garlic in butter for 1 minute
Pour in heavy cream, bring to a simmer
Stir in Parmesan until melted and smooth
Toss pasta with sauce and sliced chicken
Garnish with parsley and extra Parmesan

title: Teriyaki Salmon Bowl
steps: Mix soy sauce, mirin, honey, and ginger for teriyaki sauce
Marinate salmon for 15 minutes
Bake salmon at 400°F for 12 minutes, brushing with sauce
Divide rice among bowls
Top with salmon, avocado, and edamame
Drizzle remaining sauce and sprinkle sesame seeds

title: Stuffed Bell Peppers
ingredients: 6 bell peppers, tops removed and seeded
steps: Preheat oven to 375°F
Brown ground turkey with onion and garlic
Mix turkey with rice, diced tomatoes, half the cheese, and cumin
Season with salt and pepper
Stuff peppers with the mixture
Place in a baking dish with 1/2 inch of water
Bake 30 minutes, top with remaining cheese, bake 5 more minutes

title: Honey Garlic Pork Chops
steps: Season pork chops with paprika, salt, and pepper
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat
Sear pork chops 4 minutes per side
Mix honey, soy sauce, and garlic
Pour sauce into the skillet, reduce heat
Baste pork chops with sauce for 2-3 minutes
Garnish with fresh thyme

title: Mushroom Risotto
steps: Sauté mushrooms in olive oil until golden, set aside
Melt butter, cook onion until softened
Add rice, stir to coat, cook 1 minute
Add wine, stir until absorbed
Add broth one ladle at a time, stirring until absorbed before adding more
Continue for 18-20 minutes until rice is creamy
Stir in mushrooms and Parmesan, season with salt and pepper

title: Fish and Chips
ingredients: 4 large potatoes, cut into thick fries
steps: Cut potatoes into thick fries, soak in cold water 30 minutes
Dry fries and deep-fry at 325°F for 5 minutes, drain
Mix flour, baking powder, and salt, whisk in beer until smooth
Dip cod in batter, letting excess drip off
Deep-fry fish at 375°F for 5-6 minutes until golden
Re-fry chips at 375°F for 2 minutes until crispy
Season with salt and serve with malt vinegar and tartar sauce

title: Chicken Tikka Masala
steps: Marinate chicken in yogurt and 1 tablespoon garam masala for 1 hour
Cook marinated chicken in butter until browned
Remove chicken, sauté onion, garlic, and ginger
Add remaining garam masala and tomato sauce, simmer 10 minutes
Stir in heavy cream
Return chicken to sauce, simmer 10 minutes
Serve over basmati rice with cilantro

title: Beef Tacos
steps: Brown ground beef in a skillet, drain excess fat
Add taco seasoning with water per package directions
Simmer 5 minutes until thickened
Warm taco shells in oven
Fill shells with seasoned beef
Top with lettuce, cheese, tomatoes, sour cream, and salsa

title: Eggplant Parmesan
steps: Salt eggplant slices and let sit 30 minutes, pat dry
Set up breading station: flour, beaten eggs, breadcrumbs
Bread each eggplant slice
Bake at 400°F on oiled baking sheets for 20 minutes, flipping halfway
Layer sauce, eggplant, mozzarella, and Parmesan in a baking dish
Repeat layers, ending with cheese on top
Bake at 375°F for 25 minutes until bubbly, garnish with basil

title: Lemon Butter Shrimp Pasta
steps: Cook linguine according to package directions
Melt 2 tablespoons butter, cook shrimp 2 minutes per side, set aside
Add remaining butter, sauté garlic 30 seconds
Add wine and lemon juice, simmer 2 minutes
Toss in cooked pasta and shrimp
Garnish with parsley, red pepper flakes, and Parmesan

title: Pulled Pork Sandwiches
steps: Rub pork with paprika, garlic powder, salt, and pepper
Place in slow cooker with vinegar and brown sugar
Cook on low for 8 hours until fall-apart tender
Shred pork with two forks, mix with BBQ sauce
Toast brioche buns
Pile pulled pork on buns and top with coleslaw

title: Thai Basil Chicken
steps: Heat oil in a wok over high heat
Cook garlic and chilies for 30 seconds
Add ground chicken, break up and cook until browned
Add soy sauce, oyster sauce, fish sauce, and sugar
Stir-fry 2 more minutes
Remove from heat, stir in Thai basil until wilted
Serve over jasmine rice

title: Chocolate Chip Cookies
steps: Preheat oven to 375°F, line baking sheets with parchment
Cream butter with both sugars until fluffy
Beat in eggs and vanilla
Whisk flour, baking soda, and salt, gradually mix into wet ingredients
Fold in chocolate chips
Drop rounded tablespoons onto baking sheets
Bake 9-11 minutes until edges are golden

title: Berry Smoothie Bowl
steps: Blend berries, banana, yogurt, and milk until thick
Pour into a bowl
Top with granola, coconut flakes, chia seeds
Drizzle with honey and serve immediately

title: No-Bake Cheesecake Bites
steps: Mix cream cheese, powdered sugar, and vanilla until smooth
Roll into 1-inch balls
Mix graham cracker crumbs with melted butter
Roll each ball in the crumb mixture
Refrigerate for 1 hour
Drizzle with melted white chocolate

title: Classic Brownies
steps: Preheat oven to 350°F, grease an 8x8 baking pan
Mix melted butter and sugar
Beat in eggs and vanilla
Stir in cocoa, flour, salt, and baking powder
Pour into prepared pan
Bake 20-25 minutes until a toothpick comes out with moist crumbs
Let cool before cutting into squares

title: Banana Bread
steps: Preheat oven to 350°F, grease a 9x5 loaf pan
Mix mashed bananas with melted butter
Stir in sugar, egg, and vanilla
Add baking soda, salt, and flour, mix until just combined
Fold in walnuts
Pour into loaf pan
Bake 55-65 minutes until a toothpick comes out clean

title: Apple Crisp
steps: Preheat oven to 350°F
Toss apple slices with 2 tablespoons brown sugar and half the cinnamon
Place in a greased 9x9 baking dish
Mix oats, remaining brown sugar, flour, remaining cinnamon, and nutmeg
Cut in cold butter until crumbly
Spread topping over apples
Bake 40-45 minutes until topping is golden and apples are tender
Serve warm with vanilla ice cream

title: Lemon Bars
steps: Preheat oven to 350°F
Mix 1 cup flour, 1/4 cup powdered sugar, and butter until crumbly
Press into an 8x8 pan, bake 15 minutes
Whisk eggs, sugar, 2 tablespoons flour, lemon juice, and zest
Pour over hot crust
Bake 20 minutes until filling is set
Cool completely, dust with powdered sugar, cut into bars

title: Chocolate Mousse
steps: Melt chocolate in a double boiler, let cool slightly
Whisk egg yolks into melted chocolate one at a time
Whip cream with vanilla to soft peaks
In a separate bowl, whip egg whites with sugar to stiff peaks
Fold egg whites into chocolate mixture
Fold in whipped cream gently
Divide into serving glasses and chill at least 2 hours

title: Peanut Butter Cups
steps: Melt chocolate chips in the microwave in 30-second intervals
Spoon a small amount of chocolate into each muffin liner
Spread up the sides with a small spoon, freeze 10 minutes
Mix peanut butter, powdered sugar, butter, and salt
Place a small ball of peanut butter mixture in each cup
Cover with remaining melted chocolate
Refrigerate until set, about 1 hour

title: Strawberry Shortcake
steps: Preheat oven to 425°F
Mix flour, sugar, baking powder, cut in butter until crumbly
Stir in milk and egg until just combined
Drop 6 mounds onto a baking sheet
Bake 12-15 minutes until golden
Toss strawberries with sugar and let sit 15 minutes
Split shortcakes, fill with berries and whipped cream

title: Tiramisu
steps: Whisk egg yolks with sugar until thick and pale
Add mascarpone and mix until smooth
Fold in whipped cream
Mix espresso with coffee liqueur
Quickly dip ladyfingers in espresso mixture
Layer dipped ladyfingers in a dish, spread half the mascarpone cream
Repeat layers
Refrigerate at least 4 hours or overnight
Dust with cocoa powder before serving

title: Rice Pudding
steps: Combine rice, milk, sugar, and salt in a saucepan
Bring to a boil, then reduce to a low simmer
Cook 35-40 minutes, stirring frequently, until thick and creamy
Stir in vanilla, cinnamon, and raisins if using
Serve warm or chilled
Sprinkle extra cinnamon on top

title: Panna Cotta
steps: Sprinkle gelatin over cold water and let bloom for 5 minutes
Heat cream and sugar in a saucepan until sugar dissolves
Remove from heat and stir in bloomed gelatin until dissolved
Add vanilla extract
Pour into 4 ramekins or glasses
Refrigerate at least 4 hours until set
Top with fresh berries before serving

title: Churros
steps: Bring water, butter, and salt to a boil
Remove from heat, add flour, stir vigorously until dough forms a ball
Beat in eggs one at a time until smooth
Fill a piping bag with a star tip
Heat oil to 375°F
Pipe 4-inch strips into oil, fry until golden, about 2 minutes per side
Drain on paper towels
Roll in cinnamon sugar and serve with chocolate sauce

title: Mango Sorbet
steps: Blend frozen mango, sugar, lime juice, and water in a food processor
Scrape down sides and blend again until smooth
Transfer to a freezer-safe container
Freeze for 2-3 hours, stirring every 30 minutes
Scoop and serve

title: Cookie Dough Truffles
steps: Cream butter and brown sugar
Mix in flour, vanilla, and milk until a dough forms
Fold in mini chocolate chips
Roll into 1-inch balls, place on a parchment-lined tray
Freeze 30 minutes
Melt chocolate coating, dip each ball
Return to tray and refrigerate until set

title: Crème Brûlée
ingredients: 1/2 cup sugar plus extra for topping
steps: Preheat oven to 325°F
Heat cream until it just begins to simmer
Whisk egg yolks with sugar until pale
Slowly pour hot cream into yolks while whisking
Add vanilla and salt
Pour into 4 ramekins, place in a water bath
Bake 40-45 minutes until set but jiggly in center
Chill at least 2 hours
Sprinkle sugar on top and torch until caramelized

title: Peach Cobbler
steps: Preheat oven to 350°F
Toss peaches with 1/2 cup sugar and cinnamon
Pour melted butter into a 9x13 baking dish
Mix flour, remaining sugar, baking powder, milk, and vanilla
Pour batter over butter — do not stir
Spoon peaches over batter — do not stir
Bake 45-55 minutes until golden and bubbly
Serve warm with vanilla ice cream

title: Coconut Macaroons
steps: Preheat oven to 325°F, line baking sheets with parchment
Mix coconut, condensed milk, and vanilla
Whip egg whites with salt to stiff peaks
Fold egg whites into coconut mixture
Drop rounded tablespoons onto baking sheets
Bake 20-25 minutes until golden on edges
Cool completely, dip bottoms in melted chocolate
Set on parchment until chocolate hardens

title: Guacamole with Chips
steps: Halve avocados, remove pits, scoop into a bowl
Mash with a fork to desired consistency
Stir in lime juice, salt, onion, cilantro, tomatoes, garlic, and cumin
Taste and adjust seasoning
Serve with tortilla chips

title: Hummus with Veggie Sticks
steps: Add chickpeas, tahini, lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, cumin, and salt to food processor
Blend until smooth
Add water if too thick
Transfer to bowl, drizzle with olive oil
Cut vegetables into sticks
Sprinkle hummus with paprika and serve

title: Energy Balls
steps: Combine all ingredients in a bowl
Refrigerate 30 minutes
Roll into 1-inch balls
Place on parchment-lined tray
Refrigerate 1 hour before serving
Store in fridge up to one week

title: Trail Mix
steps: Combine all ingredients in a large bowl
Toss to distribute evenly
Divide into portion-sized bags or containers
Store in an airtight container at room temperature

title: Cheese and Crackers Board
steps: Arrange cheeses on a board, leaving space between them
Fill gaps with crackers
Add clusters of grapes and dried apricots
Place small piles of mixed nuts around the board
Drizzle honey into a small dish and place on the board
Serve at room temperature for best flavor

title: Apple Slices with Peanut Butter
steps: Core apples and slice into wedges
Spread peanut butter on each slice or serve in a bowl for dipping
Drizzle with honey
Sprinkle with granola and mini chocolate chips

title: Caprese Skewers
steps: Thread a tomato, basil leaf, and mozzarella ball onto each skewer
Arrange on a platter
Drizzle with olive oil and balsamic glaze
Season with salt and pepper
Serve at room temperature

title: Roasted Chickpeas
steps: Preheat oven to 400°F
Pat chickpeas very dry with paper towels
Toss with olive oil, paprika, garlic powder, cumin, salt, and pepper
Spread in a single layer on a baking sheet
Bake 30-40 minutes, shaking pan halfway, until very crispy
Let cool completely — they crisp up more as they cool

title: Yogurt Dip with Pita
steps: Mix yogurt with grated cucumber and garlic
Stir in lemon juice, olive oil, and dill
Season with salt and pepper
Refrigerate 30 minutes to let flavors meld
Toast pita triangles in the oven at 375°F for 5 minutes
Serve dip cold with warm pita

title: Stuffed Dates
steps: Slice each date lengthwise and remove the pit
Fill each date with a teaspoon of almond butter
Press an almond into the top of each
Drizzle with melted dark chocolate
Sprinkle with flaky sea salt
Refrigerate 15 minutes until chocolate sets

title: Popcorn Three Ways
ingredients: For savory: nutritional yeast and garlic powder
steps: Heat coconut oil in a large pot over medium heat
Add popcorn kernels, cover with a lid
Shake pot occasionally until popping slows
Divide popcorn into three bowls
Season one with nutritional yeast and garlic powder
Season one with cinnamon and sugar
Season one with chili lime and salt

title: Ants on a Log
steps: Wash and cut celery stalks into 3-inch pieces
Fill the groove of each celery piece with peanut butter
Press raisins into the peanut butter
Arrange on a plate and serve
Great for kids and adults alike

title: Frozen Yogurt Bark
steps: Mix yogurt with honey
Spread evenly on a parchment-lined baking sheet
Scatter berries, granola, chocolate chips, and coconut on top
Press toppings gently into the yogurt
Freeze for at least 3 hours until solid
Break into pieces and serve immediately

title: Cucumber Bites
ingredients: Smoked salmon or everything bagel seasoning
steps: Slice cucumbers into 1/2-inch thick rounds
Mix cream cheese with dill, lemon zest, salt, and pepper
Pipe or spread cream cheese mixture onto each cucumber round
Top with a small piece of smoked salmon or sprinkle with everything bagel seasoning
Arrange on a platter and serve

title: Banana Ice Cream
steps: Slice frozen bananas into coins before freezing
Blend frozen banana coins in a food processor until crumbly
Add peanut butter, cocoa powder, and almond milk
Continue blending until smooth and creamy like soft serve
Scoop into bowls and add toppings
Serve immediately or freeze 30 minutes for firmer texture

title: Edamame
steps: Boil edamame in salted water for 3-4 minutes
Drain and toss with sesame oil
Season with sea salt and garlic powder
Sprinkle with sesame seeds
Serve warm — squeeze pods to eat the beans

title: Deviled Eggs
steps: Peel eggs and cut in half lengthwise
Remove yolks and place in a bowl
Mash yolks with mayonnaise, mustard, vinegar, salt, and pepper
Pipe or spoon filling back into egg white halves
Garnish with paprika and chopped chives
Chill until ready to serve

title: Sweet Potato Fries
steps: Preheat oven to 425°F
Cut sweet potatoes into 1/4-inch thick fries
Toss with olive oil, paprika, garlic powder, salt, and pepper
Spread in a single layer on two baking sheets
Bake 20-25 minutes, flipping halfway, until crispy
Serve hot with dipping sauce

title: Rice Cake Bites
steps: Spread almond butter on each rice cake
Top with banana slices
Drizzle with honey
Dust with cinnamon
Cut in half or serve whole

title: Bruschetta
steps: Preheat oven to 400°F
Brush baguette slices with olive oil, toast 5-7 minutes
Mix tomatoes, basil, garlic, olive oil, and balsamic vinegar
Season with salt and pepper
Spoon onto toasted bread
Serve immediately

title: Spinach Artichoke Dip
ingredients: 10 oz frozen spinach, thawed and drained
steps: Preheat oven to 350°F
Squeeze water from spinach
Mix cream cheese, sour cream, Parmesan, and half the mozzarella
Stir in spinach, artichokes, and garlic
Transfer to a baking dish, top with remaining mozzarella
Bake 25-30 minutes until bubbly
Serve with pita chips or bread

title: Stuffed Mushrooms
steps: Preheat oven to 375°F
Remove mushroom stems, scoop out gills
Mix cream cheese, Parmesan, garlic, parsley, salt, and pepper
Fill each mushroom cap with the mixture
Mix breadcrumbs with melted butter, sprinkle on top
Bake 20-25 minutes until golden and mushrooms are tender
Serve warm

title: Shrimp Cocktail
ingredients: 1 lb large shrimp, peeled and deveined
steps: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil
Cook shrimp 2-3 minutes until pink and curled
Transfer to ice water to stop cooking
Mix ketchup, horseradish, lemon juice, and Worcestershire for cocktail sauce
Arrange shrimp around a glass with cocktail sauce in the center
Garnish with lemon wedges and parsley

title: Meatballs in Marinara
steps: Mix ground beef, breadcrumbs, egg, garlic, Parmesan, Italian seasoning, salt, and pepper
Roll into 1-inch meatballs
Brown meatballs in a skillet with olive oil on all sides
Pour marinara sauce into the skillet
Simmer 15-20 minutes until meatballs are cooked through
Garnish with fresh basil
Serve with toothpicks or small bread slices

title: Cheese Quesadilla Bites
ingredients: Salsa and sour cream for dipping
steps: Melt butter in a skillet over medium heat
Place a tortilla in the skillet
Sprinkle with cheese and jalapeños
Top with another tortilla
Cook 2 minutes per side until golden and cheese melts
Cut into small triangles
Serve with salsa and sour cream

title: Bacon-Wrapped Dates
steps: Preheat oven to 400°F
Stuff each date with a small piece of goat cheese
Wrap each date with a half strip of bacon
Secure with a toothpick
Place on a baking sheet lined with parchment
Bake 15-18 minutes until bacon is crispy
Drizzle with balsamic glaze and serve

title: Crab Cakes
steps: Pick through crab meat for shells
Mix mayo, egg, mustard, Worcestershire, green onions, and Old Bay
Gently fold in crab meat and enough panko to bind
Form into 8 patties
Chill for 30 minutes
Pan-fry in butter 3-4 minutes per side until golden
Serve with lemon wedges and tartar sauce

title: Pigs in a Blanket
steps: Preheat oven to 375°F
Unroll crescent dough and cut each triangle into 3 strips
Wrap each sausage with a strip of dough
Place on a baking sheet seam-side down
Brush with melted butter and sprinkle with sesame seeds
Bake 12-15 minutes until golden
Serve with mustard for dipping

title: Caprese Flatbread
steps: Preheat oven to 400°F
Place flatbreads on a baking sheet
Drizzle with olive oil
Top with mozzarella slices and cherry tomatoes
Season with salt and pepper
Bake 8-10 minutes until cheese melts
Top with fresh basil and drizzle with balsamic glaze
Cut into pieces and serve

title: Korean Fried Cauliflower
steps: Mix flour, cornstarch, and water into a batter
Heat oil for frying to 375°F
Dip cauliflower in batter and fry until golden, about 4 minutes
Drain on paper towels
Mix gochujang, soy sauce, honey, and sesame oil in a pan over medium heat
Toss fried cauliflower in the sauce
Garnish with sesame seeds and green onions

title: Baked Brie
steps: Preheat oven to 350°F
Place brie on a parchment-lined baking sheet
Score the top of the brie in a crosshatch pattern
Bake for 10-12 minutes until soft but not melting
Drizzle with honey
Sprinkle with walnuts and thyme
Serve immediately with crackers and bread

title: Loaded Potato Skins
steps: Bake potatoes at 400°F for 1 hour until tender
Cut in half, scoop out most of the flesh (save for another use)
Brush skins with olive oil, season with salt and pepper
Bake cut-side up for 10 minutes until crispy
Fill with cheddar and bacon
Bake 5 more minutes until cheese melts
Top with sour cream and green onions

title: Spring Rolls
steps: Dip rice paper in warm water for 10 seconds until pliable
Lay flat on a work surface
Place a small amount of noodles, lettuce, carrots, cucumber, and herbs in the center
Fold the bottom up, fold in sides, then roll tightly
Repeat with remaining wrappers
Serve with peanut dipping sauce

title: Jalapeño Poppers
steps: Preheat oven to 400°F
Cut jalapeños in half lengthwise, remove seeds and membranes
Mix cream cheese, cheddar, bacon, garlic powder, salt, and pepper
Fill each jalapeño half with the mixture
Place on a baking sheet
Bake 20-25 minutes until jalapeños are tender and filling is bubbly
Let cool slightly before serving — they're hot!

title: Antipasto Skewers
steps: Thread ingredients onto wooden skewers alternating: salami fold, mozzarella, tomato, artichoke, olive, and basil
Arrange skewers on a platter
Drizzle with balsamic glaze
Serve at room temperature

title: Coconut Shrimp
steps: Mix coconut and panko in a bowl
Set up breading station: flour, beaten eggs, coconut-panko mixture
Dredge shrimp in flour, dip in egg, coat in coconut mixture
Heat oil to 350°F
Fry shrimp 2-3 minutes per side until golden
Drain on paper towels
Serve with sweet chili sauce

title: Deviled Egg Dip
steps: Chop hard-boiled eggs finely
Mix with mayonnaise, mustard, vinegar, salt, and pepper
Transfer to a serving bowl
Sprinkle generously with paprika and chopped chives
Serve with crackers or crostini
Can be made ahead and refrigerated

title: Buffalo Cauliflower Bites
steps: Preheat oven to 450°F
Mix flour, milk, and garlic powder into a batter
Toss cauliflower in batter and place on a greased baking sheet
Bake 20 minutes until lightly crispy
Mix hot sauce with melted butter
Toss baked cauliflower in buffalo sauce
Bake 5 more minutes
Serve with ranch and celery

title: Minestrone Soup
steps: Heat olive oil, cook onion, carrots, and celery 6-7 minutes
Add garlic and Italian seasoning, cook 1 minute
Add tomatoes and broth
Add beans, bring to a boil
Add pasta, simmer 10 minutes
Stir in spinach until wilted
Serve with Parmesan

title: Chicken Tortilla Soup
steps: Sauté onion until softened
Add garlic, cumin, and chili powder
Add broth, tomatoes, beans, and corn
Add whole chicken breasts, simmer 25 minutes
Shred chicken, return to pot
Top with tortilla strips, sour cream, and avocado

title: Tomato Basil Soup
steps: Heat olive oil, sauté onion 5 minutes
Add garlic, cook 1 minute
Add tomatoes and broth, simmer 20 minutes
Blend until smooth with immersion blender
Stir in heavy cream
Season with salt and pepper
Garnish with fresh basil

title: Chicken Noodle Soup
steps: Heat olive oil, sauté onion, carrots, and celery 5 minutes
Add garlic, cook 1 minute
Add broth, bay leaf, and whole chicken breasts
Simmer 20 minutes until chicken is cooked
Remove chicken, shred, return to pot
Add egg noodles, cook 8 minutes
Remove bay leaf, garnish with parsley

title: French Onion Soup
steps: Melt butter in a large pot over medium-low heat
Add sliced onions and cook slowly for 35-40 minutes until deeply caramelized
Sprinkle flour over onions, stir 1 minute
Add wine, scrape up browned bits
Add beef broth and thyme, simmer 20 minutes
Ladle into oven-safe bowls
Top each with a bread slice and shredded Gruyère
Broil 2-3 minutes until cheese is bubbly and golden

title: Butternut Squash Soup
ingredients: 1 large butternut squash, peeled and cubed
steps: Melt butter, sauté onion until softened
Add garlic, cook 1 minute
Add squash and broth, bring to a boil
Simmer 20 minutes until squash is tender
Blend until smooth
Stir in cream and nutmeg
Season with salt and pepper
Garnish with pumpkin seeds

title: Broccoli Cheddar Soup
steps: Melt butter, sauté onion until softened
Add garlic, cook 1 minute
Sprinkle in flour, stir 2 minutes to make a roux
Gradually whisk in broth and milk
Add broccoli, simmer 15 minutes until tender
Stir in cream and cheddar until melted and smooth
Season with salt and pepper

title: Lentil Soup
steps: Heat olive oil, sauté onion, carrots, and celery 5 minutes
Add garlic, cumin, and paprika, cook 1 minute
Add lentils, tomatoes, and broth
Bring to a boil, reduce heat, simmer 25-30 minutes until lentils are tender
Season with salt, pepper, and a squeeze of lemon
Garnish with parsley

title: Potato Leek Soup
ingredients: 3 leeks, cleaned and sliced (white and light green parts)
steps: Melt butter in a large pot
Add leeks and cook until very soft, about 8 minutes
Add potatoes and broth, bring to a boil
Simmer 20 minutes until potatoes are tender
Blend until smooth (or leave partially chunky)
Stir in cream, season with salt and white pepper
Garnish with chives

title: Corn Chowder
ingredients: 6 ears corn, kernels cut off (or 4 cups frozen)
steps: Cook bacon until crispy, set aside, keep drippings
Add butter and onion, cook until softened
Sprinkle flour, stir 1 minute
Add broth and potatoes, simmer 15 minutes
Add corn kernels, cook 5 minutes
Stir in cream
Season with thyme, salt, and pepper
Garnish with crumbled bacon

title: Thai Coconut Soup
steps: Bring coconut milk and broth to a simmer
Stir in curry paste until dissolved
Add sliced chicken and mushrooms
Simmer 10 minutes until chicken is cooked
Add fish sauce, lime juice, and brown sugar
Taste and adjust seasoning
Garnish with cilantro and Thai basil

title: Italian Wedding Soup
ingredients: 1 lb ground pork and beef mix
steps: Mix meat, breadcrumbs, egg, Parmesan, salt, and pepper
Roll into small meatballs (about 1/2 inch)
Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil
Add broth, bring to a boil
Add meatballs and pasta
Simmer 10 minutes until pasta is cooked and meatballs are done
Stir in escarole until wilted
Serve with extra Parmesan

title: Black Bean Soup
ingredients: Sour cream, cilantro, and lime for topping
steps: Heat olive oil, sauté onion and bell pepper 5 minutes
Add garlic, cumin, and paprika, cook 1 minute
Add beans and broth, bring to a simmer
Cook 20 minutes
Blend half the soup for a creamy-chunky texture
Season with salt and pepper
Serve topped with sour cream, cilantro, and a lime squeeze

title: Clam Chowder
ingredients: 3 cans (6.5 oz) chopped clams with juice
steps: Cook bacon until crispy, remove and set aside
In the bacon fat, sauté onion and celery 5 minutes
Add butter, sprinkle in flour, stir 2 minutes
Add clam juice, potatoes, and bay leaf
Simmer 15 minutes until potatoes are tender
Add clams and cream, heat through without boiling
Season with salt and pepper, remove bay leaf
Garnish with bacon and parsley

title: Vegetable Soup
ingredients: 1 cup green beans, trimmed and cut
steps: Heat olive oil, sauté onion 3 minutes
Add carrots, potatoes, celery, and zucchini, cook 5 minutes
Add tomatoes, broth, green beans, and oregano
Bring to a boil, then simmer 20 minutes until vegetables are tender
Season with salt and pepper
Serve with crusty bread

title: Miso Soup
steps: Bring dashi to a gentle simmer
Ladle a small amount of hot dashi into a bowl with miso paste
Whisk until miso is dissolved, then pour back into the pot
Add tofu cubes and wakame
Heat gently — do not boil or miso will turn bitter
Add soy sauce to taste
Garnish with sliced green onions

title: Pozole Rojo
ingredients: Radishes, cabbage, lime, and tostadas for serving
steps: Toast dried chilies in a dry skillet until fragrant
Soak chilies in hot water 20 minutes, then blend with garlic and some soaking liquid
Brown pork in a large pot
Add broth and chili puree, bring to a boil
Reduce heat and simmer 1.5 hours until pork is tender
Add hominy and oregano, simmer 15 more minutes
Season with salt
Serve with shredded cabbage, sliced radishes, lime, and tostadas

title: Egg Drop Wonton Soup
steps: Bring broth to a boil
Add frozen wontons and cook 4-5 minutes
Add bok choy, cook 2 minutes until tender
Reduce to a gentle simmer
Slowly drizzle beaten eggs while stirring
Add soy sauce, sesame oil, and white pepper
Garnish with green onions

title: Roasted Red Pepper Soup
steps: Roast peppers under the broiler, turning, until charred all over
Place in a bowl, cover with plastic, let steam 10 minutes
Peel, seed, and chop peppers
Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil
Add roasted peppers, broth, and paprika
Simmer 15 minutes
Blend until smooth, stir in cream
Season with salt and pepper, garnish with basil

title: Mediterranean Salad
steps: Combine lettuce, cucumber, tomatoes, onion, and olives
Whisk olive oil, vinegar, and oregano for dressing
Season with salt and pepper
Toss salad with dressing
Top with crumbled feta

title: Asian Sesame Chicken Salad
steps: Combine greens, cabbage, carrot, and edamame
Whisk soy sauce, rice vinegar, sesame oil, and honey
Add chicken to salad
Toss with dressing
Top with wonton strips and sesame seeds

title: Kale Caesar Salad
ingredients: 1 bunch lacinato kale, destemmed and chopped
steps: Massage kale with olive oil, lemon juice, and a pinch of salt for 2 minutes
Toss massaged kale with Caesar dressing
Add croutons and toss again
Top with shaved Parmesan
Grind fresh pepper over the top

title: Waldorf Salad
steps: Toss diced apples with lemon juice to prevent browning
Combine apples, grapes, celery, and walnuts
Mix mayonnaise with honey
Fold dressing into the fruit mixture
Serve on lettuce leaves

title: Southwest Chicken Salad
steps: Arrange romaine in bowls
Top with chicken, black beans, corn, avocado, and tomatoes
Drizzle with cilantro lime dressing
Add tortilla strips for crunch
Toss gently before eating

title: Greek Orzo Salad
steps: Cook orzo according to package, drain and cool
Combine with tomatoes, cucumber, onion, and olives
Whisk olive oil, lemon juice, and oregano
Toss salad with dressing
Fold in feta cheese
Serve at room temperature or chilled

title: Thai Mango Salad
steps: Combine mango, bell pepper, carrots, mint, and cilantro in a bowl
Whisk fish sauce, lime juice, sugar, and chili until sugar dissolves
Pour dressing over salad and toss
Top with crushed roasted peanuts
Serve immediately

title: Spinach Strawberry Salad
steps: Place spinach in a large bowl
Add sliced strawberries and red onion
Toss with balsamic vinaigrette
Top with candied pecans and crumbled goat cheese
Serve immediately

title: Taco Salad
ingredients: 1 lb ground beef, seasoned with taco seasoning
steps: Cook and season ground beef
Arrange romaine in a large bowl
Top with beef, beans, corn, cheese, and avocado
Add crushed tortilla chips
Drizzle with salsa and sour cream
Toss and serve

title: Pear and Gorgonzola Salad
steps: Arrange greens on plates or in a bowl
Fan pear slices on top
Sprinkle with Gorgonzola and candied walnuts
Whisk olive oil, vinegar, and honey
Drizzle dressing over salad
Season with salt and pepper

title: Fattoush Salad
steps: Toast pita pieces in the oven at 400°F until crispy
Combine romaine, tomatoes, cucumber, radishes, mint, and parsley
Whisk olive oil, lemon juice, and sumac
Toss salad with dressing
Add toasted pita just before serving for crunch

title: Nicoise Salad
steps: Arrange green beans, potatoes, tomatoes, and olives on a platter
Add tuna chunks and egg quarters
Whisk olive oil, vinegar, and mustard for dressing
Drizzle dressing over the salad
Serve at room temperature as a composed salad

title: Watermelon Feta Salad
steps: Arrange watermelon cubes on a platter
Scatter feta, mint, and red onion over the top
Drizzle with olive oil and lime juice
Season lightly with salt and pepper
Serve immediately while cold

title: Chopped Italian Salad
steps: Chop all ingredients to similar sizes
Combine lettuce, salami, pepperoncini, tomatoes, onion, and chickpeas
Toss with Italian vinaigrette
Top with shaved Parmesan
Serve immediately

title: Grilled Peach Salad
steps: Brush peach halves with olive oil
Grill cut-side down 3-4 minutes until char marks appear
Arrange arugula on plates
Place grilled peaches on top
Tear burrata over the salad
Sprinkle with pistachios
Drizzle with honey and balsamic vinegar

title: Arugula and Prosciutto Salad
steps: Arrange arugula on a platter
Drape prosciutto pieces over the arugula
Scatter cherry tomatoes and pine nuts
Shave Parmesan over the top
Drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice
Season with salt and pepper

title: Couscous Salad
steps: Cook couscous according to package, fluff with a fork and cool
Add tomatoes, cucumber, parsley, mint, and raisins
Whisk olive oil, lemon juice, and cumin
Toss salad with dressing
Season with salt and pepper
Serve at room temperature

title: Beet and Goat Cheese Salad
steps: Wrap beets in foil and roast at 400°F for 45-60 minutes until tender
Let cool, peel, and slice
Arrange greens on plates
Top with beet slices and crumbled goat cheese
Sprinkle with candied pecans
Whisk olive oil, balsamic, and honey for dressing
Drizzle over salad

title: Chinese Chicken Salad
steps: Combine cabbage, chicken, mandarin oranges, and green onions
Whisk rice vinegar, soy sauce, sesame oil, and honey
Toss salad with dressing
Top with crispy chow mein noodles and sliced almonds
Serve immediately while noodles are still crunchy

title: Gyoza Dumplings
steps: Mix pork, cabbage, green onions, soy sauce, sesame oil, and ginger
Place a teaspoon of filling in each wrapper
Moisten edges with water, fold and pleat to seal
Heat vegetable oil in a skillet over medium-high heat
Place dumplings flat-side down, cook 2 minutes until golden
Add water and cover, steam 5 minutes until cooked through
Serve with soy dipping sauce

title: Tres Leches Cake
steps: Preheat oven to 350°F, grease a 9x13 pan
Beat eggs and sugar until fluffy, fold in flour and milk
Pour into pan and bake 25-30 minutes
Mix condensed milk, evaporated milk, cream, and vanilla
Poke holes all over the warm cake with a fork
Pour milk mixture over cake, refrigerate at least 4 hours
Top with whipped cream and a dusting of cinnamon

title: Chicken Fried Rice
steps: Heat vegetable oil in a wok over high heat
Cook diced chicken until done, set aside
Scramble eggs in the wok, break into pieces, set aside
Add more oil, stir-fry garlic 30 seconds
Add cold rice and peas/carrots, stir-fry 3-4 minutes
Return chicken and eggs to wok
Add soy sauce and sesame oil, toss to combine
Garnish with green onions

title: Chicken Club Sandwich
steps: Toast all bread slices
Spread mayonnaise on each slice
Layer chicken, Swiss cheese, lettuce on first slice
Add second bread slice
Layer bacon, cheddar, tomato on second slice
Top with third bread slice
Cut diagonally into quarters, secure with toothpicks

title: Caesar Pasta Salad
steps: Cook pasta, drain and cool
Combine pasta with romaine, tomatoes, and chicken
Toss with Caesar dressing
Top with Parmesan shavings and croutons
Season with salt and pepper
Serve chilled or at room temperature

title: Fruit and Nut Butter Bites
steps: Slice dried apricots in half if large
Spread a small amount of cashew butter on each apricot
Top with a chocolate chip or two
Sprinkle with coconut, hemp seeds, and sea salt
Arrange on a plate and serve
Store extras in the fridge

title: Cream of Mushroom Soup
steps: Melt butter, sauté mushrooms until golden, about 8 minutes
Add onion and garlic, cook 3 minutes
Sprinkle flour, stir 2 minutes
Gradually whisk in broth
Simmer 15 minutes
Blend half for a creamy-chunky texture
Stir in cream and thyme
Season with salt and pepper, drizzle with truffle oil if desired
